title: Prometeu - Romanian Open Data History
description: Historical snapshots of Romanian public data, tracked via git-scraping

border-traffic.title: Trafic Frontieră - Border Crossing Wait Times
border-traffic.description: Real-time and historical wait times at Romanian border crossings, tracked every 6 hours

wait-by-status.title: Current Status Distribution
wait-by-status.query: SELECT Status as status, count(*) as count FROM trafic_frontiere_version tv JOIN commits c ON tv._commit = c.id WHERE c.id = (SELECT max(id) FROM commits WHERE namespace = (SELECT id FROM namespaces WHERE name = 'trafic_frontiere')) GROUP BY Status ORDER BY count DESC

wait-trend.title: Average Wait Time Over Time (Trucks Exiting)
wait-trend.query: SELECT c.commit_at as date, CAST(tv.Timp AS REAL) as avg_wait, tv.Denumire as crossing FROM trafic_frontiere_version tv JOIN commits c ON tv._commit = c.id WHERE tv.[Tip vehicul] = 'Camioane' AND tv.Sens = 'Ieșire' AND tv.Status != 'green' ORDER BY c.commit_at

top-congested.title: Most Congested Crossings (Red/Orange)
top-congested.query: SELECT Denumire as crossing, count(*) as times_congested, [Tip vehicul] as vehicle FROM trafic_frontiere_version WHERE Status IN ('red', 'orange') GROUP BY Denumire, [Tip vehicul] ORDER BY times_congested DESC LIMIT 15

border-map.title: Border Crossings Map (latest snapshot)
border-map.query: SELECT Denumire as label, CAST(Latitude AS REAL) as latitude, CAST(Longitude AS REAL) as longitude, Status, Timp as wait_min, [Tip vehicul] as vehicle, Sens as direction FROM trafic_frontiere_map_version tv JOIN commits c ON tv._commit = c.id WHERE c.id = (SELECT max(id) FROM commits WHERE namespace = (SELECT id FROM namespaces WHERE name = 'trafic_frontiere_map'))

latest-by-crossing.title: Latest Wait Times by Crossing
latest-by-crossing.query: SELECT tv.Denumire as Crossing, tv.Timp as 'Wait (min)', tv.Status, tv.[Tip vehicul] as Vehicle, tv.Sens as Direction, tv.Info FROM trafic_frontiere_version tv JOIN commits c ON tv._commit = c.id WHERE c.id = (SELECT max(id) FROM commits WHERE namespace = (SELECT id FROM namespaces WHERE name = 'trafic_frontiere')) ORDER BY CAST(tv.Timp AS INTEGER) DESC

heating-bucharest.title: CMTEB - Termoficare București
heating-bucharest.description: Bucharest district heating system status - failures, deficiencies and repairs tracked over time

status-pie.title: Current Status Distribution
status-pie.query: SELECT status, count(*) as count FROM cmteb_version cv JOIN commits c ON cv._commit = c.id WHERE c.id = (SELECT max(id) FROM commits WHERE namespace = (SELECT id FROM namespaces WHERE name = 'cmteb')) GROUP BY status

total-zones.title: Total Heating Zones Tracked
total-zones.query: SELECT count(*) as zones FROM cmteb_version cv JOIN commits c ON cv._commit = c.id WHERE c.id = (SELECT max(id) FROM commits WHERE namespace = (SELECT id FROM namespaces WHERE name = 'cmteb'))

status-trend.title: Failures & Deficiencies Over Time
status-trend.query: SELECT c.commit_at as date, cv.status, count(*) as count FROM cmteb_version cv JOIN commits c ON cv._commit = c.id WHERE cv.status IN ('avarii', 'deficiente') GROUP BY c.commit_at, cv.status ORDER BY c.commit_at

failures-list.title: Current Failures & Repairs
failures-list.query: SELECT denumire as Zone, status as Status, stare as Details, tip as Type, remediere as 'Repair ETA' FROM cmteb_version cv JOIN commits c ON cv._commit = c.id WHERE c.id = (SELECT max(id) FROM commits WHERE namespace = (SELECT id FROM namespaces WHERE name = 'cmteb')) AND status != 'functionale' ORDER BY status

brasov-reports.title: Sesizări Brașov - Citizen Reports
brasov-reports.description: Citizen reports and incidents in Brașov, tracked over time

by-category.title: Reports by Category
by-category.query: SELECT Categorie as category, count(*) as count FROM sesizari_bv WHERE Categorie IS NOT NULL AND Categorie != '' GROUP BY Categorie ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 12

by-status.title: Reports by Status
by-status.query: SELECT StateCodeName as status, count(*) as count FROM sesizari_bv WHERE StateCodeName IS NOT NULL AND StateCodeName != '' GROUP BY StateCodeName ORDER BY count DESC

recent-reports.title: Most Recent Reports
recent-reports.query: SELECT Categorie as Category, Title, StateCodeName as Status, CreatedOn_F as 'Created' FROM sesizari_bv WHERE Title IS NOT NULL AND Title != '' ORDER BY CreatedOn DESC LIMIT 20

air-quality.title: Calitate Aer - Air Quality
air-quality.description: Air quality monitoring in Bucharest — AQI index, PM2.5, PM10 levels tracked over time

aqi-bar.title: Air Quality Index by Station (Latest)
aqi-bar.query: SELECT name as station, CAST(ica AS REAL) as aqi FROM aerlive_bucuresti WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND ica IS NOT NULL AND CAST(ica AS REAL) > 0 ORDER BY CAST(ica AS REAL) DESC

pm25-bar.title: PM2.5 Levels by Station
pm25-bar.query: SELECT name as station, CAST(pm25 AS REAL) as pm25 FROM aerlive_bucuresti WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND pm25 IS NOT NULL AND CAST(pm25 AS REAL) > 0 ORDER BY CAST(pm25 AS REAL) DESC

pm10-bar.title: PM10 Levels by Station
pm10-bar.query: SELECT name as station, CAST(pm10 AS REAL) as pm10 FROM aerlive_bucuresti WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND pm10 IS NOT NULL AND CAST(pm10 AS REAL) > 0 ORDER BY CAST(pm10 AS REAL) DESC

aqi-trend.title: AQI Over Time (Historical)
aqi-trend.query: SELECT c.commit_at as date, av.name as station, CAST(av.ica AS REAL) as aqi FROM aerlive_bucuresti_version av JOIN commits c ON av._commit = c.id WHERE av.name IS NOT NULL AND av.ica IS NOT NULL AND CAST(av.ica AS REAL) > 0 ORDER BY c.commit_at

pm-trend.title: PM2.5 Over Time (Historical)
pm-trend.query: SELECT c.commit_at as date, av.name as station, CAST(av.pm25 AS REAL) as pm25 FROM aerlive_bucuresti_version av JOIN commits c ON av._commit = c.id WHERE av.name IS NOT NULL AND av.pm25 IS NOT NULL AND CAST(av.pm25 AS REAL) > 0 ORDER BY c.commit_at

station-map.title: Station Locations (AQI colored)
station-map.query: SELECT name as label, CAST(lat AS REAL) as latitude, CAST(long AS REAL) as longitude, CAST(ica AS REAL) as aqi, CAST(pm25 AS REAL) as pm25, CAST(pm10 AS REAL) as pm10 FROM aerlive_bucuresti WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND lat IS NOT NULL AND long IS NOT NULL

buc-table.title: All Stations Detail
buc-table.query: SELECT name as Station, CAST(ica AS REAL) as 'AQI (ICA)', CAST(pm25 AS REAL) as 'PM2.5', CAST(pm10 AS REAL) as 'PM10', CAST(no2 AS REAL) as 'NO₂', lastReadingTime as 'Last Reading' FROM aerlive_bucuresti WHERE name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(ica AS REAL) DESC

bear-interventions.title: Intervenții Urs - Bear Interventions
bear-interventions.description: Bear intervention reports across Romania — chasing, relocations, euthanasia, and shootings by county, locality, and time

total-interventions.title: Total Bear Interventions
total-interventions.query: SELECT count(*) as total FROM interventii_urs_version

by-event-type.title: By Event Type
by-event-type.query: SELECT event_type, count(*) as count FROM interventii_urs_version WHERE event_type IS NOT NULL AND event_type != '' GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY count DESC

by-county-stacked.title: Interventions by County (stacked by event type)
by-county-stacked.query: SELECT judet as county, event_type, count(*) as count FROM interventii_urs_version WHERE judet IS NOT NULL AND judet != '' GROUP BY judet, event_type ORDER BY count DESC

top-localities.title: Top 15 Localities
top-localities.query: SELECT uat as locality, judet as county, count(*) as count FROM interventii_urs_version WHERE uat IS NOT NULL AND uat != '' GROUP BY uat, judet ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15

by-sex.title: Bears by Sex/Type
by-sex.query: SELECT sex_urs as bear_type, count(*) as count FROM interventii_urs_version WHERE sex_urs IS NOT NULL AND sex_urs != '' GROUP BY sex_urs ORDER BY count DESC

monthly-trend.title: Interventions Over Time (by month)
monthly-trend.query: SELECT substr(data, 1, 7) as month, event_type, count(*) as count FROM interventii_urs_version WHERE data IS NOT NULL AND data != '' AND length(data) >= 7 GROUP BY month, event_type ORDER BY month

bear-map.title: All Intervention Locations
bear-map.query: SELECT judet || ' — ' || uat as label, CAST(lat AS REAL) as latitude, CAST(long AS REAL) as longitude, event_type, judet as county FROM interventii_urs_version WHERE lat IS NOT NULL AND lat != '' AND CAST(lat AS REAL) BETWEEN 43.5 AND 48.5 AND CAST(long AS REAL) BETWEEN 20.0 AND 30.0

recent-list.title: Recent Interventions
recent-list.query: SELECT judet as County, uat as Location, event_type as 'Event Type', sex_urs as 'Bear Type', descriere_eveniment as Description, data as Date FROM interventii_urs_version WHERE judet IS NOT NULL ORDER BY data DESC LIMIT 25

sumal-timber.title: SUMAL - Inspectorul Pădurii (Timber Transport)
sumal-timber.description: Timber transport permits tracked from inspectorulpadurii.ro — locations, permit types, and volumes

total-permits.title: Total Tracked Permits
total-permits.query: SELECT count(*) as total FROM sumal_locations_version

by-type.title: Permits by Type
by-type.query: SELECT tipAviz as permit_type, count(*) as count FROM sumal_locations_version sv JOIN commits c ON sv._commit = c.id WHERE c.id = (SELECT max(id) FROM commits WHERE namespace = (SELECT id FROM namespaces WHERE name = 'sumal_locations')) AND tipAviz IS NOT NULL GROUP BY tipAviz ORDER BY count DESC

permit-map.title: Active Permit Locations
permit-map.query: SELECT codAviz as label, CAST(lat AS REAL) as latitude, CAST(lng AS REAL) as longitude, tipAviz as permit_type FROM sumal_locations_version sv JOIN commits c ON sv._commit = c.id WHERE c.id = (SELECT max(id) FROM commits WHERE namespace = (SELECT id FROM namespaces WHERE name = 'sumal_locations')) AND lat IS NOT NULL AND lng IS NOT NULL AND CAST(lat AS REAL) BETWEEN 43.5 AND 48.5 AND CAST(lng AS REAL) BETWEEN 20.0 AND 30.0

permits-table.title: Current Permits (latest snapshot)
permits-table.query: SELECT codAviz as 'Permit Code', tipAviz as Type, CAST(lat AS REAL) as Lat, CAST(lng AS REAL) as Lng, idDepozit as 'Depot ID' FROM sumal_locations_version sv JOIN commits c ON sv._commit = c.id WHERE c.id = (SELECT max(id) FROM commits WHERE namespace = (SELECT id FROM namespaces WHERE name = 'sumal_locations')) ORDER BY codAviz LIMIT 50

overview.title: Prometeu - Overview
overview.description: Summary of all tracked Romanian open data feeds

total-snapshots.title: Total Snapshots
total-snapshots.query: SELECT count(*) as total_snapshots FROM commits

data-feeds.title: Active Data Feeds
data-feeds.query: SELECT count(*) as feeds FROM namespaces

latest-update.title: Latest Update
latest-update.query: SELECT max(commit_at) as latest FROM commits

feed-sizes.title: Records per Data Feed
feed-sizes.query: SELECT n.name as feed, count(*) as records FROM commits c JOIN namespaces n ON c.namespace = n.id GROUP BY n.name ORDER BY records DESC

trafic_frontiere_version.title: Trafic Frontieră - Border Crossing Wait Times (history)
trafic_frontiere_version.description: Wait times at Romanian border crossings by vehicle type and direction, tracked over time

trafic_frontiere_map_version.title: Trafic Frontieră Map (history)
trafic_frontiere_map_version.description: Border crossing map data with geographic coordinates, tracked over time

cmteb_version.title: CMTEB - Termoficare București (history)
cmteb_version.description: Bucharest district heating system status by zone, tracked over time

sesizari_bv.title: Sesizări Brașov - Citizen Reports
sesizari_bv.description: Citizen reports and incidents in Brașov

sesizari_bv_version.title: Sesizări Brașov (history)
sesizari_bv_version.description: Citizen reports tracked over time showing status changes

aerlive_bucuresti.title: Calitate Aer București
aerlive_bucuresti.description: Air quality monitoring stations in Bucharest

interventii_urs_version.title: Intervenții Urs - Bear Interventions (history)
interventii_urs_version.description: Bear intervention reports across Romania, tracked over time
